title: Important Announcement About Registration Renewal Period
content:
Announcements

Details

Date: 28 June 2024

Important Announcement About Registration Renewal Period

Dear International Students,

The 2024-2025 registration renewal period will end on July 12, 2024.

The late registration renewal period will start on July 13, 2024 and 5% late re-registration fee will be applied to the registration renewal transactions to be made after that date.

*The University reserves the right to change the dates and rates.

Paylaş
